name: VantaCode Sectors to CISA PPD-21 Critical Infrastructure Sectors

mappings.notes: SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers manufacturing, storing, and transporting chemical substances.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers sites drawing large crowds for shopping, business, entertainment, or lodging.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers telecommunications, broadcasting, cable, and internet services.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers production of essential materials and goods.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers dam projects, navigation locks, levees, hurricane barriers.
SRMA: Department of Defense. Covers research, development, production, delivery, and maintenance of military weapons systems.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers resources providing response services during and after incidents.
SRMA: Department of Energy. Covers electricity, oil, and natural gas infrastructure.
SRMA: Department of the Treasury. Covers banks, credit unions, insurance, securities, and investment institutions.
SRMA: USDA / HHS. Covers farms, restaurants, and food manufacturing, processing, and storage.
SRMA: DHS / GSA. Covers buildings and infrastructure owned by federal, state, local, tribal, or territorial governments.
SRMA: Department of Health and Human Services. Covers public and private healthcare providers, health insurance, medical equipment.
SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers hardware, software, IT systems, and services including internet infrastructure.

mappings.target_name: Nuclear Reactors, Materials, and Waste Sector
mappings.notes: SRMA: Department of Homeland Security. Covers nuclear power plants, research reactors, fuel cycle facilities, radioactive waste.
SRMA: DHS / DOT. Covers aviation, highway, maritime, mass transit, pipeline, freight rail, and postal shipping.
SRMA: Environmental Protection Agency. Covers drinking water and wastewater treatment and distribution systems.
Not a PPD-21 designated sector. Increasingly targeted by ransomware and data theft campaigns. No formal SRMA designation.
Not a PPD-21 designated sector. Covered by Space Policy Directive 5 (SPD-5) for cybersecurity of space systems.
Not a PPD-21 designated sector. May overlap with Financial Services sector for regulated crypto entities.
Not a PPD-21 designated sector. May overlap with Information Technology sector. Executive Order 14110 (Oct 2023) establishes AI safety requirements.
